commands.review_summary:
The branch updates attempt-execution session-history detection to consider assistant messages after the latest user turn, inspect the transcript tail, preserve Claude CLI record forms, and add regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +15, Tests +37. Total +52 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. current main source shows the broad assistant-anywhere guard, and the PR body gives a real temp JSONL transcript with old assistant history plus a fresh unanswered user turn. I did not run tests locally because this review was required to keep the checkout read-only.
